name: Kasu Brahmananda Reddy National Park
location: Jubilee Hills / Banjara Hills / Film Nagar, Hyderabad
originalGO: GO Ms. No. 22 dated 3 Feb 1994 (Secured Forest, AP Forest Act 1967)
ESZ: SO 3425(E), October 2020 — as narrow as 3 metres in places
projectName: H-CITI (Hyderabad City Innovative and Transformative Infrastructure)
projectScope: 7 flyovers (4.6 km total) + 7 underpasses (2.8 km) encircling the park

contacts.name: R.V. Karnan, IAS
contacts.note: Executing authority for H-CITI. Reviewed KBR flyover site 30 March 2026.
contacts.mailSubject: Urgent: Halt illegal tree felling at KBR National Park — H-CITI project

contacts.name: [Verify at forests.telangana.gov.in]
contacts.note: Head of dept that manages KBR. Must personally approve all permissions under WPA.
contacts.mailSubject: Urgent: Halt tree felling at KBR National Park — WPA S.29 violation

contacts.name: Anurag Jayanthi
contacts.mailSubject: Urgent: Stop H-CITI construction at KBR National Park

timeline.text: Notified as Secured Forest (Jubilee Hills Forest) under AP Forest Act 1967 — GO Ms. No. 22
Notified as KBR National Park under WPA 1972 — GO Ms. No. 187 EFS&T. One of only two National Parks inside an Indian metropolitan city.
SRDP project (6 flyovers) proposed. NGT orders status quo. 'Save KBR' citizen movement forms.
ESZ notified — SO 3425(E). As narrow as 3 metres — well below NBWL recommendation.
GO Rt. Nos. 125 & 126 invoke RFCTLARR S.10A to acquire 332 properties (65,876 sq yards), bypassing SIA and public hearing.
H-CITI allocated ₹2,654 crore. MEIL awarded contract. 7 flyovers + 7 underpasses encircling park.
Construction begins. 1,532 trees felled. Dr. Lubna Sarwath files formal representation alleging no valid WALTA designated-officer approval.
Telangana HC (CJ Aparesh Kumar Singh + J. G.M. Mohiuddin) refuses stay. Case adjourned to 5 May 2026.
Gen Z-led protest outside KBR main gate. 1,800 more trees marked.

violations.what: Felling requires prior approval from designated officer of Hyderabad District WALTA Authority
violations.detail: Dr. Sarwath: no valid permission obtained. Project acting ultra vires.

violations.what: Validly constituted TPC must oversee large-scale felling
violations.detail: TPC members serving beyond stipulated tenures.

violations.what: No destruction of vegetation in National Park without CWW written permission
violations.detail: PIL in Telangana HC. Stay refused 31 Mar 2026. Next hearing 5 May 2026.

violations.what: Acquisition requires Social Impact Assessment and public hearing

violations.detail: H-CITI split into 2 EPC packages, each below threshold.

violations.what: National Parks require adequate Eco-Sensitive Zone buffer
violations.detail: ESZ in places only 3 metres wide.

evidenceLog.description: KBR notified as National Park under WPA 1972
ESZ notified, in places only 3 metres wide
S.10A invoked to bypass SIA for 332 properties
Telangana HC refuses stay on tree felling, adjourns to 5 May 2026
evidenceLog.source: Telangana HC daily order — CJ Aparesh Kumar Singh + J. G.M. Mohiuddin
